summary: Comprehensive testing of preset system (Asetukset) with MongoDB persistence. All backend APIs and frontend UI components work correctly.
seed_data_creation: Tests use TEST_ prefix for test data and clean up via /api/presets/reset
context_for_next_testing_agent: Preset system is fully functional. Backend CRUD APIs tested via pytest. Frontend SettingsDialog tested via Playwright. Key features verified: 1) GET/PUT /api/presets/tools with MongoDB persistence, 2) GET/PUT /api/presets/maksuera with MongoDB persistence, 3) POST /api/presets/reset returns defaults, 4) SettingsDialog opens/closes correctly, 5) Add/delete/edit presets in dialog, 6) Tallenna saves to MongoDB, 7) Palauta oletukset resets to defaults, 8) 'Muu' custom option has BOTH name AND price input fields (data-testid='custom-preset-name' and 'custom-preset-price'), 9) Prices displayed next to preset names in selector.

backend.description: GET /api/presets/tools returns default presets with correct structure
PUT /api/presets/tools saves and persists to MongoDB
Items with constructionType and hasOptions work correctly
PUT /api/presets/maksuera saves and persists to MongoDB
POST /api/presets/reset deletes custom and returns defaults
After reset, GET returns default presets
Empty presets can be saved and loaded

frontend.test: Mittaus presetit tab shows tool presets
Maksuerätaulukko tab shows YSE-6 and YSE-8 presets
Tool selector dropdown works (Suorakulmio, Viiva, etc.)
Group selector works (Katto, Lattia, Alakatto rakennus)
'+ Lisää preset' button adds new preset
Palauta oletukset shows confirmation and resets
ToolPresetSelector shows prices next to names
'Muu' custom option shows name input field
'Muu' custom option shows price input field
Custom name and price can be filled and submitted
Maksuerätaulukko shows rows with selite and percent

backend_presets_api.GET /api/presets/tools: Returns default presets if none saved, or custom presets from MongoDB
backend_presets_api.PUT /api/presets/tools: Saves presets to MongoDB with upsert
backend_presets_api.GET /api/presets/maksuera: Returns default YSE presets or custom from MongoDB
backend_presets_api.PUT /api/presets/maksuera: Saves maksuerä presets to MongoDB with upsert
backend_presets_api.POST /api/presets/reset: Deletes all custom presets from MongoDB and returns defaults

frontend_settings_dialog.preset_management: Add/edit/delete presets with immediate UI feedback
frontend_settings_dialog.mongodb_persistence: Tallenna saves to API, reopening dialog loads from API
frontend_settings_dialog.reset_functionality: Palauta oletukset clears custom presets via API

tool_preset_selector.price_display: Shows prices next to preset names (e.g., 'Pölysidonta 2.5 €/m²')
tool_preset_selector.muu_custom_input: Both name AND price input fields with data-testid attributes
tool_preset_selector.groups: Shows grouped presets (Katto, Lattia, Alakatto rakennus, Muu)

ToolPresetSelector.js.lines_278-460: 'Muu' custom input has name field (data-testid='custom-preset-name') and price field (data-testid='custom-preset-price')
ToolPresetSelector.js.line_457: Prices displayed next to preset names when preset.price > 0

SettingsDialog.js.lines_769-779: handleReset calls resetPresetsAPI and updates state

App.js.lines_91-97: Loads tool presets from API on mount via fetch

server.py.lines_453-528: CRUD endpoints for presets with MongoDB persistence
